creator: mohd.akram@outlook.com
text:
(In reply to Chris Rees from comment #1)

I do have rpcbind running. CDE works without dtspc so it's not a big issue. It also seems like some additional setup needs to be done - https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/installing-cde-on-freebsd.55125/page-3.

I don't think that's the issue with Xsession as it was fixed by installing ksh93. It seems ksh93 is only listed as a build dependency that's why there's an issue when using pkg to install CDE.

$ head -n 1 /usr/local/dt/bin/Xsession
#! /usr/local/bin/ksh93
